passes_skipped_reasons.4: no openspec/specs/ baseline (greenfield change); no archived requirements to check against

findings.title: "one-screen" not defined; could split implementations
findings.recommendation: Define "one-screen" (e.g., "≤24 visible lines on an 80×24 terminal") or explicitly mark it approximate.

findings.title: --limit N: behavior with N=0 or negative N unspecified
findings.recommendation: Add edge-case scenarios (N=0 → empty recent[]; N<0 → non-zero exit).

findings.title: "most recent JSON" ambiguous — by which timestamp?
findings.recommendation: Specify timestamp source as ISO-8601 embedded in filename, descending.

findings.title: Tier-2 rule 4 — "task edit" definition ambiguous (file mtime vs git commit?)
findings.recommendation: Define as most recent mtime of tasks.md.

findings.title: Edge case unspecified: both explore.md AND changes/<name>/ exist (mid-promotion state)
findings.recommendation: Add explicit precedence rule: changes/<name>/ wins if both exist.

findings.title: Error paths not specified (missing openspec/, missing jq, corrupted .orbit-runs JSON)
findings.recommendation: Add small error-handling requirement covering openspec/ not found, jq missing, malformed JSON.

findings.title: Multi-change tie-break on equal last_touched mtimes unspecified
findings.recommendation: Add parenthetical: on tie, lexicographic order of change name.

findings.title: next_unchecked extraction logic underspecified for malformed tasks.md lines
findings.recommendation: Note: first line matching regex `^- \[ \] [0-9]+\.[0-9]+ (.+)$`; malformed lines skipped.

findings.title: 76 tasks across 18 groups — consider chunking note for apply
findings.recommendation: Add preamble suggesting logical apply chunks.

findings.title: design.md "Open Questions" still has 3 unresolved items at proposal time
findings.recommendation: Decide whether to resolve before /opsx:apply or accept as deferred.

final_assessment: No critical issues. 6 warning(s) to consider. Ready to apply (with noted improvements).
iteration_note: 10 of these findings appeared in the previous run on 2026-05-19. 0 new this run. Pushback verified all 10 against current state — none stale. --mark wrote markers for the 6 WARNINGs across 3 spec files; the 4 SUGGESTIONs are skipped per default policy.
